provenance.source_section: Tier boundaries and target P/S bands
derivation_steps: Apply lower-inclusive and upper-exclusive tier boundaries.
Assign GPPE 1000000 to the tech tier and use the 8 to 10 target P/S band.
Assign GPPE 3000000 to the large-model-native tier and use the 20 to 30 target P/S band.
Compute each target P/S midpoint as the arithmetic midpoint of its band.
provenance.claim_ceiling: deterministic tier-boundary and target-band regression only
